title: Wisps Vanilla+
description: a simple vanilla+ modpack i made that makes the game that much  more fun.
body:
this modpack, has mostly biome and structure overhalls, adding a lot to the base game, but thats not all, im planning on maybe making this into a magic modpack later on, but the main thing it does is make it a vanilla+ game.

if you dont have the modrinth app, join my [discord](https://discord.gg/qMTMFS97Ac) for the files.
